root-question.text: Are drivers present (is_own_code, is_io_or_time_or_random, verify_calls_needed, stateful_reuse_count)?

branch.conclusion: Leave the real implementation in place; do not mock internal collaborators.

question.text: Is the dependency stateful AND used in > 3 test files?

branch.conclusion: Author a Fake (in-memory working impl) under the adapter layer.

question.text: Is verify_calls_needed true (must assert call args/count)?

branch.conclusion: Use Mock with autospec; pin expected call signature.
Use Stub — canned return values only.

decision-tree.example: q-root yes → q-own no → q-state >3 → r-fake-pick
